resources.string: User responsible for creating and managing plans
User able to view and follow plans
Represents the object that calms the supervised user
There are no events for this day. Click on \"+\" to create an event.
There are no events to follow this day
3.1 Starting the application for the first time: Password creation
Select the avatar of the planned
Pictograms will be displayed according to your preference
Dont have an account? Register here
Are you sure you want to delete the selected event?
Are you sure you want to delete the selected plan?
If you want to delete the plan, all associated events will also be deleted
Are you sure you want to log out?
Are you sure you want to exit planning?
If you exit now, all progress made will be lost
Select an image from the gallery
At PlanTEA you can plan your events and activities easily and quickly.
The soothing activity represents the object that calms the supervised user
Aragonese Center of Augmentative and Alternative Communication

This application has been developed by the CHICO group. CHICO is a research group of the University of Castilla-La Mancha based at the Higher School of Informatics of the Ciudad Real Campus that also has researchers at the Faculty of Education of Ciudad Real, at the School of Mining and Industrial Engineering of Almadén, and at the Faculty of Social Sciences of Talavera de la Reina.
The groups research interest is mainly focused on new methods, techniques, tools and processes of Computer Engineering for the improvement of interactive and collaborative tasks.

This work has been developed in the context of the APTEA Project (Ref. TED2021–131956B-I00), funded by the MICIN/AEI/10.13039/501100000033 and the European Union funds "NextGenerationEU"/ PRTR; of the PlanTEAAF Project (Ref. 2022-GRIN-34175) within the framework of the Own Research Plan of the University of Castilla - La Mancha, co-financed by the European Regional Development Fund (ERDF); and the collaboration agreements with AUTRADE (Ref. 220413CONV) and FACLM (Ref. 230405CONV).
Are you sure you want to delete the selected notebook?
Choose an avatar for the activity/object that calms the supervised user
Choose an avatar for the person who is going to create and manage the plans
Choose an avatar for the person who is going to follow the plans
In this section you can find information about the use of the application, as well as the functionalities it offers.

string-array.name: str_crearEvento
string-array.item: Go to "Calendar" and click the button + located in the lower right corner.
Selects a "time" and optionally "reminder" for the event.
If no plan is available, you can click "+ New plan" to create a new one.
If you already have a plan created, select the desired plan to use in the event.
Finally, click "Save" to create the event.
To view the event, change its visibility by clicking on the "eye" icon

string-array.name: str_crearPlanificacion
string-array.item: Go to "Calendar" and click the button "+"< /b> located in the lower right corner.
Click the + New plan button.
Enter a title for the plan.
To add a pictogram to the plan, click on a "category" and then on the desired pictogram.
To search for a pictogram, click the "search bar" and type the name of the pictogram you want to search for.
If you want to save a pictogram as a favorite, click on the "heart icon located in the upper right corner of the pictogram. These pictograms will be saved to the category of "Favorites".
To add additional text to the pictogram or add a duration to the pictogram, click the 3 dots located in the upper right corner of the pictograms on the list and select the desired option.
Finally, click the "Save" button to save the plan.

string-array.name: str_cuaderno
string-array.item: Go to "Communication notebooks" and select the notebook you want to edit.
To add a new notebook, click "Add Notebook". If you want the notebook to be able to express the intensity of a pictogram, click on the "Thermometer" switch.
To add a new pictogram, click "Add pictogram" located at the end of the notebook.
To add a pictogram from the ARASAAC collection, type the pictogram you want to add in the search bar and click on the button + located in the upper right corner.
To delete a pictogram, click the trashcan icon in the upper left corner.

string-array.name: str_traductor
string-array.item: Go to "Translator" and write the phrase you want to translate in the upper text field.
Once you have written the phrase, click the "Translate" button located at the end of the text field.
At the bottom, each word will be displayed as a pictogram.
If you need to remove a pictogram from the translation, click the trashcan icon in the upper right corner of the pictogram.
To change the image of a pictogram, select another one from those available with a simple click, or press and hold to choose an image from the gallery.
If you want to save the translation, click the Save button located below the translation.

resources.string: This privacy policy describes PlanTEAs policies and procedures regarding the collection, use and disclosure of your information in the PlanTEA mobile application and the services, features, content or applications related thereto (collectively, " PlanTEA"). In connection with your use of PlanTEA, we receive information about you from various sources, including through your PlanTEA user account and your use of our mobile application, or any other application of ours that is linked to this privacy notice.
By using PlanTEA you are consenting to the collection, transfer, manipulation, storage, transmission, disclosure and other uses of your information as described in this Privacy Policy.

Reading this privacy notice will help you understand your privacy rights and options. If you do not agree with our policies and practices, please do not use our services. If you still have any questions or concerns, please contact us at plantea.asistencia@gmail.com
2. What does this privacy policy cover?

This Privacy Policy covers the treatment of personally identifiable information ("Personal Information") that we collect when you are using or accessing PlanTEA. This Privacy Policy does not apply to the practices of third parties that we do not own or control, including, but not limited to, any third party websites, content sources, services and applications (“Third Party Services”) that you choose to access. through PlanTEA, or to individuals we do not manage or employ. Although we try to provide access to only those third-party services that share our respect for your privacy, we cannot be responsible for the content or privacy policies of those third-party services. We encourage you to carefully review the privacy policies of any third-party services you access.

We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you register for the Services, express interest in obtaining information about us or our products and services, participate in activities on the Services, or otherwise when you contact us. Contact us.

The personal information we collect depends on the context of your interactions with us and the services, the choices you make, and the products and features you use. The personal information we collect may include the following: Names, email addresses, usernames, passwords, contact or authentication data.
We do not process sensitive information.
If you use our application(s), we may also collect the following information if you choose to provide us with access or permissions:

Access to the mobile device. We may request access or permissions to certain features of your mobile device, including calendar, reminders, storage, and other features. If you would like to change our access or permissions, you can do so in your device settings.

Mobile device data. We automatically collect device information (such as your mobile device ID, model and manufacturer), operating system, system version and configuration information, device and application identification numbers, browser type and version, hardware model, carrier Internet services and/or mobile operator, and Internet Protocol (IP) address (or proxy server). If you are using our application(s), we may also collect information about the telephone network associated with your mobile device, the operating system or platform of your mobile device, the type of mobile device you use, your devices unique ID mobile phone and information about the features of our application(s) that you accessed.

Push notifications. We may request to send you push notifications about your account or certain features of the application(s). If you wish to opt out of receiving these types of communications, you can disable them in your device settings.
This information is primarily needed to maintain the security and operation of our application(s), for troubleshooting, and for our internal analysis and reporting purposes.
All personal information you provide to us must be true, complete and accurate, and you must notify us of any changes to such personal information.

We automatically collect certain information when you visit, use or browse the services. This information does not reveal your specific identity (like your name or contact information), but may include device and usage information, such as your Internet Protocol (IP) address, browser and device characteristics, operating system, preferences. language, referring URL, device name, country, location, information about how and when you use our services, and other technical information. This information is primarily needed to maintain the security and operation of our services, as well as for our internal analysis and reporting purposes.
4. Is the information about me secure?

Sensitive information is stored exclusively on the device locally, thus guaranteeing an additional level of security and privacy. Additionally, the information is encrypted using secure encryption algorithms.
5. What legal bases do we rely on to process your information?

The General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the UK GDPR require us to explain the valid legal bases we rely on to process your personal information. Therefore, we may rely on the following legal bases to process your personal information:
Consent: We may process your information if you have given us permission (i.e. consent) to use your personal information for a specific purpose. You can withdraw your consent at any time.

Legitimate interests: We may process your information where we believe it is reasonably necessary to pursue our legitimate business interests, and those interests do not outweigh your interests, fundamental rights and freedoms. For example, we may process your personal information for some of the purposes mentioned below:
• Analyze how our services are used to improve them and attract and retain users.
• Diagnose problems and/or prevent fraudulent activities.
• Understand how our users use our products and services to improve the user experience.

Legal obligations: We may process your information when we believe it is necessary to comply with our legal obligations, such as cooperating with a law enforcement or regulatory agency, exercising or defending our legal rights. , or disclose your information as evidence in litigation in which we are involved.

Vital interests: We may process your information when we consider it necessary to protect your vital interests or the vital interests of a third party, such as situations involving potential threats to the security of anyone.
We may update our privacy policy when necessary. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new privacy policy on this page.
We will notify you by email and/or by means of a prominent notice on our service, before the change becomes effective, and we will update the "Last updated" date at the top of this privacy policy .
You are recommended to periodically review this privacy policy for any changes. Changes to this privacy policy are effective when posted on this page.
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, you can contact us by email: pose.asistencia@gmail.com
PlanTEA needs permissions to show notifications
You have to fill out all the fields
A title is needed for the new pictogram
An image is needed for the new pictogram
You cannot leave the title field empty
You can\'t leave the plan empty
There are no applications to export the event to
A name is needed for each user
One image is needed for each user
An image and name of the calming object are needed
You cannot leave the field empty
Error updating. Enter the data again
Password must be at least 6 characters
The email address is not valid
Cannot save a translation without pictograms
The previous step has not been performed
There are no pictograms in this category
Enter a name for the planification
Cannot create events on past dates
Error creating the account. The email is already in use
Select the date of the event
You cannot leave the name field empty
Select the event for the day
